items.headline: Microsoft dips below 200-day moving average: Buy, hold, or sell?
items.summary: Opening Bid's Stock of the day: Microsoft has slipped below its 200-day moving average. Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi is joined by Crossmark Global Investments Chief Market Strategist Victoria Fernandez and Yahoo Finance Markets & Data Editor Jared Blikre to break down what's driving the weakness in the tech giant and how to play it going forward.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.

items.headline: Why robotics will be the next great investment theme
items.summary: RoboStrategy (BOT) CEO Andrew Kang joins Yahoo Finance to explain why robotics could become the market's next major investment theme. He discusses how advances in artificial intelligence are accelerating the adoption of autonomous machines and why the convergence of AI and robotics may create significant opportunities for investors.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: What investors should know before hopping on SpaceX options trades
items.summary: While SpaceX (SPCX) holds onto stock gains in Tuesday's session, the options market has been abuzz today as more traders chase options contracts on the space company. YieldMax ETFs chief strategist Mike Khouw comes on Market Domination to speak more about what retail investors should beware of when hopping into options trades on a company fresh off of its IPO.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Tesla Defies Auto Industry Sales Slump, Goldman Raises Q2 Delivery Forecast
items.summary: Goldman Sachs expects rising Tesla sales at a time when the broader auto industry is struggling.  Goldman's forecast of 420,000 cars would be a 9.3% increase compared to Q2 2025, when Tesla delivered 384,122 vehicles.  Sales growth of that level would buck current trends for both Tesla — which has had two years of declining sales — and the overall auto industry — with sales projected to slip 2.6% year over year for the quarter, according to Cox Automotive.
items.why_it_matters: News appears more supportive of sentiment or growth expectations.

items.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) Stock Gets A 1.6 Million Contract Options Debut
items.summary: SpaceX, trading as NasdaqGS:SPCX, saw options on its stock launch within days of its IPO. Options trading on SPCX recorded over 1.6 million contracts on the first day. The debut ranked just behind Tesla and Nvidia for first day options volume. This early options listing is unusual for a newly public mega-cap company.
